description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to decrease the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turn(s).\nTriggers <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attacks</color> by two allies.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 감소시킵니다.\n아군 2인의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵を攻撃し、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターンDOWNさせる。\n味方2人の<color=#28d9ed>協攻</color>を発生させる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>概率使目标<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合。\n触发2名友军的<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) When an ally is hit, counterattacks with <color=#28d9ed>Nirvana's Inferno</color>.\nBefore attacking, removes <color=#28d9ed>2</color> buff(s) from the target, and reduces Evasion for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. If the target is <color=#28d9ed>Earth element</color>, ignores their Resilience, and does not miss.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 아군이 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>피안의 겁화</color>로 반격 합니다.\n 공격 전 대상의 강화 효과를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제하고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 회피를 감소시킵니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>지속성</color>이라면 대상의 효과 저항을 무시하고, 빗나감이 발생하지 않습니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)味方がダメージを受けた時、<color=#28d9ed>【彼岸劫火】</color>で反撃する。\n(発動効果)攻撃前、対象に強化効果を<color=#28d9ed>2個</color>解除し、回避を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。対象が<color=#28d9ed>地属性</color>の場合、対象の効果抵抗を無視し、ミスヒットが発生しない。
description.zh: (触发效果)友军受到攻击时,用<color=#28d9ed>血液轮回</color>反击。\n攻击前解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color>强化效果,并使回避降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。若目标为<color=#28d9ed>土属性</color>,则无视目标的效果抵抗,且不会触发闪避。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Grants <color=#28d9ed>Sustained Recovery</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nThis skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of the target's Defense.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다.\n이 스킬은 대상의 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>継続回復</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは対象の防御力を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n该技能无视目标防御力的<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en: Each turn, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> (up to 10 stacks).\nEach turn, increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> (up to 5 stacks).\nReduces damage taken while clones are alive.
description.kr: 매 턴 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>씩 증가합니다.(최대 10회 누적)\n매 턴 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>씩 증가합니다.(최대 5회 누적)\n분신 생존 시 받는 피해가 감소합니다.
description.jp: 毎ターン、自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>ずつUP(最大10回)。\n毎ターン、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>ずつUP(最大5回)。\n分身が生存している間、受けるダメージがDOWN。
description.zh: 每回合使自身<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提高<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>(最多10层)。\n每回合使全体友军<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提高<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>(最多5层)。\n分身存活时,所受伤害降低。

description.en: Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> every 4 turns.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>Enraged Ultimate Skill</color>: Deals damage to all enemies, then <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects (Greater)</color> all allies. Afterwards, grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Healing</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turn(s).
description.kr: 4턴 마다 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입과 필살기</color> : 적 전체에게 피해를 입힌 뒤, 모든 아군을 부활(강화)시킵니다. 이후, 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 4ターンごとに<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:敵全体にダメージを与え、味方全体を<color=#28d9ed>復活(強化)</color>させる。その後、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターン付与する。
description.zh: 每4回合转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>陷入狂暴化和必杀技</color>:对全体敌人造成伤害后,使全体友军<color=#28d9ed>复活(强化)</color>;随后为全体友军赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合。
